doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant rights law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process or right to cure.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant rights law—Illinois law requires a court eviction process and tenants have the right to cure non-payment within the 5-day notice period, contrary to the document's claims that tenants must simply vacate.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant rights law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process or right to cure.
